acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-compliance SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Open source compliance is the most important job in community, we hope this SIG will improve the capability of community member.. The SIG has 5 core members and maintains 2 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-compliance SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-compliance SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-compliance SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-compliance SIG maintains 2 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-compliance.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-compliance SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-compliance SIG has 5 Maintainers, including: Wei Jianggang, Xu Yuancong, Chen Yixiong. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
